xs.$comment: Spacing between individual tags in extra small size group

sm.$comment: Spacing between individual tags in small size group

md.$comment: Spacing between individual tags in medium size group

lg.$comment: Spacing between individual tags in large size group

xs.$comment: Horizontal padding for extra small tag group container

sm.$comment: Horizontal padding for small tag group container

md.$comment: Horizontal padding for medium tag group container

lg.$comment: Horizontal padding for large tag group container

xs.$comment: Vertical padding for extra small tag group container

sm.$comment: Vertical padding for small tag group container

md.$comment: Vertical padding for medium tag group container

lg.$comment: Vertical padding for large tag group container

add-button.$comment: Add button component that appears at the end of tag groups to allow adding new tags

xs.$comment: Size of the add button for extra small tag group (matches tag height)

sm.$comment: Size of the add button for small tag group (matches tag height)

md.$comment: Size of the add button for medium tag group (matches tag height)

lg.$comment: Size of the add button for large tag group (matches tag height)

xs.$comment: Border radius for extra small add button (fully rounded)

sm.$comment: Border radius for small add button (fully rounded)

md.$comment: Border radius for medium add button (fully rounded)

lg.$comment: Border radius for large add button (fully rounded)

default.$comment: Border width for add button in default state

xs.$comment: Horizontal padding for extra small add button

sm.$comment: Horizontal padding for small add button

md.$comment: Horizontal padding for medium add button

lg.$comment: Horizontal padding for large add button

xs.$comment: Vertical padding for extra small add button

sm.$comment: Vertical padding for small add button

md.$comment: Vertical padding for medium add button

lg.$comment: Vertical padding for large add button

default.$comment: Background color for add button in default state

hover.$comment: Background color for add button on hover

active.$comment: Background color for add button when pressed/active

focused.$comment: Background color for add button when focused

default.$comment: Border color for add button in default state

hover.$comment: Border color for add button on hover

active.$comment: Border color for add button when pressed/active

focused.$comment: Border color for add button when focused

xs.$comment: Icon size for extra small add button

sm.$comment: Icon size for small add button

md.$comment: Icon size for medium add button

lg.$comment: Icon size for large add button

default.$comment: Icon color for add button in default state

hover.$comment: Icon color for add button on hover

active.$comment: Icon color for add button when pressed/active

focused.$comment: Icon color for add button when focused

ring.$comment: Focus ring color for add button when keyboard focused

layout.$comment: Layout properties for the tag group container

direction.$comment: Flex direction for tag group (horizontal layout)

align-items.$comment: Vertical alignment of tags within the group

justify-content.$comment: Horizontal alignment of tags within the group

flex-wrap.$comment: Allow tags to wrap to next line if container width is exceeded

xs.$comment: Maximum width for extra small tag group container

sm.$comment: Maximum width for small tag group container

md.$comment: Maximum width for medium tag group container

lg.$comment: Maximum width for large tag group container

overflow.$comment: Overflow properties for handling tags that exceed container width

behavior.$comment: How overflow content is handled - visible allows wrapping
